nodes.label: sanad-command-palette.png
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Sanad application's Today/Dashboard view in Arabic (RTL). Shows a personalized greeting, daily priorities task list, prominent 'Start Focus' CTA, sidebar navigation with all main sections, role switcher (Student/Lawyer), PWA install prompt, and ⌘K quick-search hint. Despite the filename suggesting a command palette, the image shows the main daily operations dashboard.

nodes.label: Today View (اليوم)
nodes.description: The primary landing/home screen of Sanad. Displays a personalized greeting, the current date, a 'Today's Priorities' (أولويات اليوم) widget with actionable task cards, and a 'Start Focus' (ابدأ تركيز) call-to-action button. This is the first section highlighted in the sidebar navigation.

nodes.label: Daily Priorities Widget (أولويات اليوم)
nodes.description: A card-based widget on the Today view showing the lawyer's top action items for the day. Example tasks shown: following up on a confidentiality agreement signing (5 days overdue) and sending a status email to a client (Gulf Pharmacies). Each task card has a title and a brief description or reminder context.

example_tasks: متابعة توقيع اتفاقية السرية (Follow up on confidentiality agreement signing)
تحديث العميل بشأن صيدليات الخليج (Update client on Gulf Pharmacies)

nodes.label: Start Focus Button (ابدأ تركيز)
nodes.description: A prominent full-width button on the Today view labeled 'ابدأ تركيز' (Start Focus). Likely initiates a Deep Work session, connecting the dashboard view to the Deep Work feature. Styled as the primary CTA on the screen.

nodes.label: Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Right-side navigation panel listing all main application sections: Today (اليوم), Dashboard (لوحة التحكم), Clients (العملاء), Cases Board (لوحة القضايا), Communications (الاتصالات), Documents (المستندات), Invoices (الفواتير), Compliance (الامتثال, badge: 4), Tasks (المهام, badge: 9), Deep Work (العمل العميق), Calendar (التقويم). Badge counts on Compliance and Tasks indicate pending items.

nodes.label: Role Switcher (Student / Lawyer)
nodes.description: Toggle UI in the top navigation bar allowing switching between 'طالب' (Student) and 'محامي' (Lawyer/Attorney) roles. In the screenshot the Lawyer role is active (highlighted). This is a core UX feature enabling the same user to switch between legal professional and student learning contexts.

nodes.label: Top Navigation Bar
nodes.description: RTL top bar containing: app branding (سند / Sanad with subtitle 'العمليات اليومية' - Daily Operations), info icon, dark mode toggle, language switcher (EN/AR), refresh button, search icon, role switcher (Student/Lawyer), live date-time display, and user avatar.

nodes.label: ⌘K Quick Search / Command Palette
nodes.description: The application advertises '⌘K للبحث السريع' (⌘K for quick search) in the sidebar footer. This is the command palette trigger that matches the screenshot filename 'sanad-command-palette.png'. The command palette itself is not shown open in this screenshot — only the hint text is visible.

nodes.label: PWA (Progressive Web App) Feature
nodes.description: The sidebar footer contains a PWA install prompt: 'ثبّت تطبيق PWA. ثبّته على سطح المكتب للوصول اليومي.' (Install the PWA app. Pin it to the desktop for daily access.) The bottom status bar also states 'PWA مفعّل' (PWA enabled) and 'محسّن للخادم المنزلي' (optimized for home server), indicating self-hosted deployment.

nodes.label: Sanad App Identity & Purpose
nodes.description: Bottom status bar text: 'سند — لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية' (Sanad — Daily operations dashboard for lawyers and small businesses in Saudi Arabia). Defines the product's core identity: Arabic-first, Saudi market, legal professionals and SMBs.
